title: Slovakian Tuna Salad
description: A refreshing Slovakian-inspired tuna salad made with pilaf, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Drain the liquid from the canned tuna and set aside.
In a medium bowl, combine the cooked pilaf, red onion, salt, and black pepper.
Add the drained tuna, Slovakian paprika, and dense, citrusy vinegar to the bowl.
Mix well until the ingredients are evenly combined.
Stir in the chopped fresh parsley.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the tuna salad at room temperature or chilled.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
Serve with crusty bread or on its own for a satisfying meal.
